zh.lifeSummary: Roger Maxwell Sargent是Maxwell William Sargent的兒子，於1504年12月17日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾。他於1526年與Elizabeth Tale在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年7月17日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Roger Maxwell Sargent是Maxwell William Sargent的儿子，于1504年12月17日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾。他于1526年与Elizabeth Tale在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1549年7月17日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sargent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English sergeaunt ‘servant’ (Old French sergent, serjant). The surname probably originated for the most part in this sense, but the word also developed a number of more specialized meanings in the medieval period, including ‘tenant by military service below the rank of knight’. It was also used for a variety of administrative and legal offices, which may have contributed to the development of the surname. The sense ‘non-commissioned officer’ did not arise until the 16th century. Compare Sergent .

History: William Sargent (1624–1717) came to Gloucester, MA, from Devon, England before 1678. Many of his descendants distinguished themselves in the civil and military affairs of the colonies and some in literary or artistic paths, notably the portrait painter John Singer Sargent (1856–1925).

variants.name: Sergent
meanings: French: status or occupational name from Old French sergent, serjant ‘servant’ (see Sargent ).
Americanized form of Jewish (from Poland) Sierżant: artificial name meaning ‘sergeant’ (senior noncommissioned officer in the Polish infantry).

variants.name: Surgent
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anatole, Emile.
Slovak: probably a nickname derived from Latin surgens, the present participle of surgo ‘to rise, to get up, to arise’.
French: probably a derivative of Surge, an occupational name from Old French surge ‘surgeon’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, in origin a local name from a minor place on the River Tweed, named as ‘the stream (Old English well(a)) of Mack’. The latter is a form of Magnus . Maxwell was the middle name of the newspaper tycoon William Maxwell Aitken , Lord Beaverbrook ( 1879–1964 ), who was born in Canada, and it has been used as a given name among his descendants. It is now also frequently taken as an expansion of Max .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Roger Maxwell Sargent was born on 17 December 1504, in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England as the son of Maxwell William Sargent. He married Elizabeth Tale in 1526, in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 17 July 1549, in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Roger Maxwell Sargent est né le 17 décembre 1504, à Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fils de Maxwell William Sargent. Il a épousé Elizabeth Tale en 1526, à Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1549, à Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Roger Maxwell Sargent wurde am 17. Dezember 1504 in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England, als Sohn von Maxwell William Sargent geboren. Er hat 1526 in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Tale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. Juli 1549 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Roger Maxwell Sargent è nato il il 17 dicembre 1504 nel Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England come figlio di Maxwell William Sargent. Lui sposato Elizabeth Tale nel 1526, nel Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 luglio 1549, nel Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Maxwell Sargentは1504年12月17日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコウルティーンハルでMaxwell William Sargentの息子として生まれた。1526年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコウルティーンハルでElizabeth Taleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1549年7月17日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコウルティーンハルで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Maxwell Sargent(은)는 1504년 12월 17일 영국 노르섬프토실르 쿠르티홀에서 Maxwell William Sargent의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 쿠르티홀에서 Elizabeth Tale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 7월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 쿠르티홀에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Roger Maxwell Sargent nasceu em 17 de dezembro de 1504, em Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filho de Maxwell William Sargent. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Tale em 1526, em Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1549, em Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Roger Maxwell Sargent родился 17 декабря 1504 г. в местности коуртинолл, нортамптоншир, Англия. Его отца звали Maxwell William Sargent. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Tale в 1526 г. в местности коуртинолл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 июля 1549 г. в местности коуртинолл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

Murió el 17 de julio de 1549, en Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años.
